name: Synthetic Combined Diabetes and CKD Review Policy
disclaimer: Synthetic policy for demo only. Not for real coding, payment, clinical, or compliance decisions.

requirements.label: Type 2 diabetes documentation
requirements.description: Type 2 diabetes must be documented in the medical record.

requirements.label: CKD stage 3 documentation
requirements.description: CKD stage 3 must be documented in the medical record.

requirements.label: Relationship evidence
requirements.description: The record must support the relationship between diabetes and CKD.

requirements.label: Current review period
requirements.description: Supporting evidence must be documented during the 2026 review year.

requirements.label: Assessment or management
requirements.description: The condition must be assessed, monitored, evaluated, or treated.

requirements.label: No unresolved newer contradiction
requirements.description: Unresolved newer contradictory evidence requires human review.
